name: @hojai/market-os
description: MarketOS SDK - Client for Nexha MarketOS (port 4275) - federation market intelligence (pricing, demand, supply, gaps, trends).

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc __tests__/unit/index.test.ts --target ES2022 --module ES2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --declaration --outDir dist/__tests__
